---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in ChainsawFire client
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: GP-commits
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output from `debug.txt`.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 10, Android 11]
- **ChainsawFire Version**: [e.g. 0.4.17]
- **Server**: [e.g. Minetest 0.4.17, server address if applicable]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
